data.title: Binance responds to claims of "delayed response" or "insufficient action" regarding the Upbit hack: This is untrue.
data.description: Binance has responded to claims of a "delayed response" or "insufficient action" regarding the Upbit hack, stating that such claims are untrue. Binance's security and investigation teams discovered the incident immediately and took immediate steps to freeze related transactions and prevent further fund flows. Binance has maintained close cooperation with local law enforcement agencies and relevant partners, and continues to closely monitor the situation, providing support as needed. Any claims of "failure to take timely and effective action" are unfounded and inaccurate. Binance will continue to cooperate with relevant institutions and partners as appropriate.

data.title: Interactive Brokers Turns Stablecoins Into Instant Funding Rails For Traders
data.description:
Interactive Brokers has officially rolled out a new account funding option that allows clients to deposit funds instantly using stablecoins such as USDC (USD Coin) and USDT (Tether). The feature is powered by crypto infrastructure provider Zero Hash and operates around the clock, offering a faster and cheaper alternative to traditional banking transfers.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/interactive-brokers-turns-stablecoins-into-instant-funding-rails-for-traders/

data.title: January 1, 2026: the European Big Brother arrives
data.description:
From 2026, every movement of bitcoin and digital assets executed through supervised intermediaries will be recorded and shared among the tax authorities of the 27 EU countries.
source: https://atlas21.com/january-1-2026-the-european-big-brother-arrives/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=january-1-2026-the-european-big-brother-arrives

data.description:
The buybacks are funded by network revenue as Pyth reports rising traction, with its Pyth Pro product surpassing $1M ARR in its first month.

data.title: BNB Surpasses 890 USDT with a 2.83% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Dec 12, 2025, 14:33 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has crossed the 890 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 890.789978 USDT, with a narrowed 2.83% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: Significant Transfer of POL Tokens Between Anonymous Addresses
data.description: According to ChainCatcher, Arkham data reveals that at 22:18, a total of 50 million POL tokens were transferred from one anonymous address, beginning with 0x63E2, to another anonymous address, starting with 0x08B9.

data.title: Jupiter: Stablecoin JupUSD is coming soon and a unified management platform for developers is planned.
data.description: Solana ecosystem DEX Jupiter announced on the X platform that several product and infrastructure upgrades will be launched, including: Jupiter Lend ending testing and being open sourced, stablecoin JupUSD launching soon, upgrading token verification and data platform VRFD, launching a unified management platform for developers, integrating professional trading terminals, optimizing reward and incentive mechanisms, and announcing the acquisition of Rainfi to expand on-chain lending and asset liquidity.

data.title: Today, US Bitcoin ETFs saw a net outflow of 400 BTC, Ethereum ETFs saw a net inflow of 19,145 ETH, and SOL ETFs saw a net inflow of 66,055 SOL.
data.description: According to Lookonchain monitoring, the US Bitcoin ETF saw a net outflow of 400 BTC today, compared to a net inflow of 3,572 BTC over the past 7 days; the Ethereum ETF saw a net inflow of 19,145 ETH today, compared to a net inflow of 40,453 ETH over the past 7 days; and the SOL ETF saw a net inflow of 66,055 SOL today, compared to a net inflow of 357,750 SOL over the past 7 days.

data.title: Spot silver continued its surge, hitting new highs, while New York silver futures broke through $65 per ounce.
data.description: Spot silver continued its upward trend, hitting a new all-time high of $64.65 per ounce; New York silver futures broke through $65 per ounce, rising 0.67% on the day. (Jinshi)

data.title: Crypto stocks opened mixed, with BitMine down 0.31%.
data.description: According to data from msx.com, at the opening of the US stock market, the Dow Jones Industrial Average rose 0.2%, the S&P 500 fell 0.17%, and the Nasdaq Composite fell 0.46%. Cryptocurrency stocks were mixed: BitMine fell 0.31%, Circle rose 0.68%, Coinbase rose 1.33%, and Strategy fell 0.16%. msx.com is a decentralized RWA trading platform that has listed hundreds of RWA tokens, covering US stocks and ETF tokens such as AAPL, AMZN, GOOGL, META, MSFT, NFLX, and NVDA.

data.title: Federal Reserve Official to Monitor Inflation and Employment Trends
data.description: According to ChainCatcher, Federal Reserve official Hammack has stated that the institution will closely observe whether inflation is slowing down and if the job market is stabilizing.

data.title: RBC Capital Markets buys 77,700 shares of American Bitcoin.
data.description: According to market sources, the Royal Bank of Canada, with a market capitalization of $1 trillion, has just revealed that it has purchased 77,700 shares of American Bitcoin, a publicly traded Bitcoin mining company. It is understood that American Bitcoin has some connection with the Trump family.

data.title: Curve DAO announced it will increase YieldBasis's crvUSD credit limit to $1 billion.
data.description: Curve DAO announced that it has approved increasing YieldBasis's crvUSD credit line from $300 million to $1 billion. This is the maximum credit line, but it is not allocated immediately; its usage will gradually increase as crvUSD liquidity improves. Curve sets the overall credit line, and YieldBasis must increase the cap on individual YB markets within this credit line through its own governance vote.

data.title: MiCA will decide the fate of euro-pegged stablecoins in 2026.
data.description: German payment processor DECTA anticipates a key turning point for the euro-pegged stablecoin market with the full implementation of the European Crypto Asset Markets Regulation (MiCA) in 2026. MiCA will establish a unified framework for reserve, regulatory, and operational standards, potentially promoting the adoption of euro-pegged stablecoins in payment systems, trading platforms, and tokenized financial infrastructure. Market growth will depend on the speed at which MiCA-licensed issuers establish distribution channels and banking connections, as well as the level of adoption by institutions and consumers. (CoinDesk)

data.title: Federal Reserve's Ability to Set Ideal Interest Rates Hinges on Sufficient Reserves
data.description: According to ChainCatcher, Federal Reserve official Goolsbee has stated that the central bank's ability to set interest rates at optimal levels is contingent upon having adequate reserves.

data.title: Federal Reserve's Focus on AI and Inflation Target
data.description: According to Odaily, Federal Reserve official Harker stated that the Federal Reserve is dedicating significant time to studying artificial intelligence. He expressed confidence that the next Federal Reserve Chair will remain focused on the 2% inflation target.

data.title: Federal Reserve's Hamak: The Fed's policy is currently near the neutral interest rate.
data.description: Federal Reserve official Hamak stated that the Fed's policy is currently near the neutral interest rate, and it tends to adopt a slightly more restrictive policy stance, closely monitoring whether inflation slows and whether employment stabilizes. (Jinshi)

data.title: Interactive Brokers plans to allow users to deposit stablecoins into their brokerage accounts.
data.description: According to market sources, Interactive Brokers has announced plans to allow users to deposit stablecoins into their brokerage accounts.

data.title: Tether halts secondary sales amid talks to secure $20B funding for $500B valuation
data.description:
Stablecoin issuer Tether has stopped secondary share sales while pushing ahead with talks to raise as much as $20 billion in a stock deal tied to a $500 billion valuation, according to Bloomberg. The decision was reportedly made in order to block attempts by existing shareholders to sell stakes outside the company’s process, a step […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/tether-halts-secondary-sales/
